allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; [print\(f[''name'']\) for f in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f[''name'']\) for f in data]")
Bash(# Check if the VulkanHeaders source actually got downloaded ls ""/Users/shaymark/Documents/android/claudeApp/PersonalAI/llm-engine/.cxx/Debug/036o5c5z/arm64-v8a/_deps/vulkanheaders-src/"")

Bash(# Good! The headers are there. Now let''s see the actual cmake error by checking the build log or cmake cache # Check what INTERFACE_INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES is set to for Vulkan::Vulkan in the cmake cache cat ""/Users/shaymark/Documents/android/claudeApp/PersonalAI/llm-engine/.cxx/Debug/036o5c5z/arm64-v8a/CMakeCache.txt"")
Bash(# Check the full Vulkan_* variables in cmake cache cat ""/Users/shaymark/Documents/android/claudeApp/PersonalAI/llm-engine/.cxx/Debug/036o5c5z/arm64-v8a/CMakeCache.txt"")

Bash(# Check for cmake cache in llama-build to see what Vulkan vars it found cat ""/Users/shaymark/Documents/android/claudeApp/PersonalAI/llm-engine/.cxx/Debug/036o5c5z/arm64-v8a/_deps/llama-build/CMakeCache.txt"")

Bash(# llama is built as add_subdirectory, so it shares the parent''s cmake scope # The issue is: when llama.cpp calls find_package\(Vulkan COMPONENTS glslc REQUIRED\) # inside ggml/src/ggml-vulkan/CMakeLists.txt, what does it find? # # The COMPONENTS glslc REQUIRED means it will fail if glslc is not found # Let''s check if there''s an actual build error log find ""/Users/shaymark/Documents/android/claudeApp/PersonalAI/llm-engine/.cxx/Debug/036o5c5z/"" -name ""*.log"")

Bash(# Now let''s look at what tag b8233 of llama.cpp has for ggml-vulkan CMakeLists.txt # b8233 might be an OLDER version - let''s check that curl -s ""https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/b8233/ggml/src/ggml-vulkan/CMakeLists.txt"")

Bash(# At b8233, does it call find_package\(Vulkan COMPONENTS glslc REQUIRED\)? # That''s a problem: glslc is not found from NDK on macOS! # Let''s verify what the full b8233 ggml-vulkan cmake does curl -s ""https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/b8233/ggml/src/ggml-vulkan/CMakeLists.txt"")

Bash(# Let''s now check what Vulkan_INCLUDE_DIR Android NDK provides on macOS # The NDK sysroot/usr/include should have vulkan/vulkan.h ls ""/Users/shaymark/Library/Android/sdk/ndk/27.2.12479018/toolchains/llvm/prebuilt/darwin-x86_64/sysroot/usr/include/vulkan/"")

Bash(# Good - NDK does NOT have vulkan.hpp. Now let''s understand the exact error. # find_package\(Vulkan COMPONENTS glslc REQUIRED\) at b8233 tag # When Android NDK is active, CMake''s FindVulkan.cmake will find: # Vulkan_INCLUDE_DIR = NDK sysroot/usr/include # Vulkan_LIBRARY = NDK sysroot libvulkan.so # BUT glslc is NOT in the NDK on macOS \(it''s in shader-tools/linux-x86_64 which won''t work on macOS\) # COMPONENTS glslc REQUIRED means it FAILS # Let''s check if glslc exists in the NDK find ""/Users/shaymark/Library/Android/sdk/ndk/27.2.12479018/"" -name ""glslc"")
